THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IGAFO, LUVAVAA $668.90 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $694.77, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
